Ascend C conv3d_softmax_max_pool_max_pool kernel implementation
Find AscendC examples for a fused 3D convolution followed by channel-wise softmax and two successive 3D max-pooling stages, including project JSON, host tiling/operator, kernel, Python binding, and model integration code.

Ascend C conv3d_softmax_max_pool_max_pool kernel implementation
AscendC fused kernel examples for 3D convolution followed by softmax (channel dim) and two max_pool3d operations, including host tiling, op registration, and kernel implementation for Ascend 910B.

Ascend C conv3d_softmax_max_pool_max_pool kernel implementation
Please retrieve AscendC examples for implementing a fused 3D convolution followed by channel-wise softmax and two-stage max_pool3d, including tiling strategy with TPipe queues and corresponding host tiling/operator integration.
